error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to TimescaleDB. Check the DSN, ensure the database is running, and verify the user has CREATE TABLE privileges.

data_description.batch_size: Number of state changes to buffer before writing to the database. Higher values reduce write frequency but increase memory use.
data_description.flush_interval: Maximum seconds between database writes, even if the batch is not full.
data_description.chunk_interval_days: Days per hypertable chunk. Only affects new chunks — existing chunks keep their original interval. Smaller chunks compress faster but create more partitions.
data_description.compress_after_days: Days before a chunk is compressed. Compressed chunks are read-only. Must be at least the chunk interval.
